= Nimzo-Indian Defence, Leningrad Variation =
===4...h6===
Black drives the bishop back, so as to gain the ability to play ...g5 and break the pin at a later time. 5. Bxf6 Bxc3 6. bxc3 Qxf6 gives up the bishop pair and lessens White's ability to defend the weak c pawns, especially once they become fixed in place with ...c5, so the only good move is [[/5. Bh4|5. Bh4]].
